title: Pub/Sub: Qwik Start – Console
aim: To set up a Pub/Sub topic and subscription, publish messages, and view them using the Google Cloud Console.

steps.title: Set Up Pub/Sub (Create a Topic)
steps.description: Go to Pub/Sub > Topics. Click Create Topic. Topic ID: MyTopic. Click Create.

steps.title: Add a Subscription
steps.description: Inside 'MyTopic', click Create Subscription. Subscription ID: MySub. Delivery type: Pull. Click Create.

steps.title: Publish a Message
steps.description: In the Topic details, click Publish Message. Type 'Hello World' and click Publish.

steps.title: View the Message
steps.description: Go to Subscriptions > MySub. Click the 'Messages' tab and then 'Pull'. Acknowledge the message.

commands.purpose: Pull and acknowledge messages from a subscription via CLI

viva.question: What is Pub/Sub?
viva.answer: It stands for Publisher/Subscriber. It is an asynchronous messaging service that decouples services that produce events from services that process events.

viva.question: What is a Topic?
viva.answer: A named resource where publishers send messages.

viva.question: What is the difference between Pull and Push delivery?
viva.answer: In Pull delivery, the subscriber requests messages from the service. In Push delivery, Pub/Sub sends messages to a predefined HTTP endpoint.

notes: Each message must be acknowledged within the ackDeadlineSeconds window, otherwise it is re-delivered.
